evals.prompt: I just added a new function to pkg/search/client.go. Can you verify everything still passes?
evals.expected_output: Claude runs golangci-lint, then go test, scoped to the affected package. Reports results of each step. If anything fails, diagnoses and fixes before re-running from lint.

evals.prompt: do the tests pass for the ./internal/cache package?
evals.expected_output: Claude runs the pipeline (lint → test) targeting the internal/cache package directory. Uses go test ./internal/cache/... Reports clearly whether tests pass.

evals.prompt: I fixed a bug, run a quick check before I commit
evals.expected_output: Claude runs lint and tests scoped to the current working directory or the touched package (not ./...). Reports results.
